# Table of Contents

This diary explores my reflections on the methods covered in class, with a particular focus on how remote sensing can support broader geographical inquiry.

At this stage, I am still a beginner in remote sensing. While I do not yet have extensive technical experience, I am especially interested in understanding the algorithms behind methods that seem to provide a broad, bird’s-eye perspective on the earth’s surface, particularly terrain scanning and related forms of topographic observation. I am curious not only about what these techniques can show, but also about how they work, what kinds of assumptions they rely on, and what their limitations may be.

Through this course, I hope to learn methods that will deepen my academic understanding of economic geography. In particular, I am interested in how remote sensing and spatial analysis can help reveal patterns of land use, infrastructure, development, regional inequality, and human-environment relations. I therefore see this diary not only as a record of weekly learning, but also as a place to connect course methods to the kinds of questions I hope to pursue more seriously in the future.

Each week, I will reflect on the key themes, methods, and questions raised in class, while gradually building my own understanding of how these techniques may be applied in geographical research.

## Week 1

-   [intro to remote sensing](https://tsuyochan0082.github.io/CASA0023/week1.html)

## Week 2

-   [Portfolio and Xaringan](https://tsuyochan0082.github.io/CASA0023/week2.html)

## Week 3

-   [Image Correction and Spectral Enhancement](https://tsuyochan0082.github.io/CASA0023/week3.html)

## Week 4

-   [Policy (individual case study: flood system in Ho-Chi-Minh City)](https://tsuyochan0082.github.io/CASA0023/week4.html)

## Week 5

-   [Cloud Computing and Google Earth Engine](https://tsuyochan0082.github.io/CASA0023/week5.html)

## Week 6

-   [Machine Learning and Land Cover Classification](https://tsuyochan0082.github.io/CASA0023/week6.html)

## Week 7

-   [Sub-pixel and OBIA Classification](https://tsuyochan0082.github.io/CASA0023/week7.html)

## Week 8

-   [SAR Data and Damage Detection](https://tsuyochan0082.github.io/CASA0023/week8.html)
